content.title: BDO Shipwright
content.short_description: A lightweight and responsive web application designed to help Black Desert Online players track their ship building progress
content.description: A lightweight and responsive web application designed to help Black Desert Online players track their ship building progress. The application provides an intuitive card-based interface for monitoring ship upgrades, material collection, and crafting requirements. It features visual progression tracking, interactive ship trees with connecting lines, and comprehensive data management capabilities including import/export functionality and local storage persistence.
content.role: I designed and developed this complete React-based web application from scratch, implementing the entire frontend architecture including the ship tracking system, material management interface, and data persistence layer. I created the TypeScript type definitions, component structure, and state management system, along with implementing features like goal setting, processing requirements tracking, and responsive design. I also established the development workflow with Vite, ESLint configuration, and version management.

achievements: Streamlined ship building progression tracking for BDO players with an intuitive interface
Eliminated manual spreadsheet tracking by providing automated progress monitoring
Enhanced gaming experience through visual feedback and goal-setting capabilities
Improved data portability with import/export functionality for progress backup
Achieved responsive design ensuring accessibility across all device types
technologies: Local Storage API for data persistence
JSON data management and import/export functionality

screenshots: Main ship list interface showing card-based layout
Ship details view with progress tracking and material requirements
Processing popup for material crafting requirements
Progress tracking visual indicators and completion badges
